name: io.github.jonafeucht/bundesarchiv-mcp
title: Akten der Reichskanzlei – Bundesarchiv MCP
description: MCP server for searching and extracting text from Bundesarchiv PDF documents.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key required in the x-api-key request header to authenticate against the server.

environmentVariables.name: PDF_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to the directory containing PDF files to serve.

environmentVariables.name: HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host address the uvicorn server binds to.

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port the uvicorn server listens on.

MCP_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating requests to the server.
